=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:3-5:9) TS377014: You are returning an Effect-able type inside a generator function, and will result in nested Effect<Effect<...>>.
Maybe you wanted to return yield* instead?
Nested Effect-able types may be intended if you plan to later manually flatten or unwrap this Effect, if so you can safely disable this diagnostic for this line through quickfixes. effect(returnEffectInGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable returnEffectInGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable returnEffectInGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add yield* statement"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable returnEffectInGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable returnEffectInGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Add yield* statement" ===

--- file:///.src/returnEffectInGen.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const shouldWarn = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.fail("error")
})
